Class Registration.TypeRegistrar<T>

java.lang.Object
com.github.shanebeee.skr.Registration.Registrar<Registration.TypeRegistrar<T>>
com.github.shanebeee.skr.Registration.TypeRegistrar<T>
Type Parameters:
T - Type of class to register.
Direct Known Subclasses:
Registration.EnumTypeRegistrar, Registration.RegistryTypeRegistrar
Enclosing class:
Registration
public class Registration.TypeRegistrar<T> extends Registration.Registrar<Registration.TypeRegistrar<T>>
Registrar for ClassInfos.
